attributes.description: Alerts when any messages expire before being consumed (`ibmmq_qmgr_expired_message_total` rate > 0). Consumer lag or too-aggressive TTLs.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] Messages expiring before consumption

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ messages expiring before consumption

### What fired
Rate of `ibmmq_qmgr_expired_message_total` > 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Expired messages are dropped before any consumer processes them. Either consumers are lagging or the producer-side TTL is set too aggressively for current consumption throughput.

### Triage
1. Check queue depth and consumer counts on affected queues.
2. Validate the configured TTL for business expectations.

### Remediation
- Add consumer capacity.
- Raise TTL if business rules allow.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero rate.
